title: alsine tenuifolia subsp. kotschyana
intro: Alsine tenuifolia subsp. kotschyana, also known as the mountain sweet violet or alpine violet, is a plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Alsine tenuifolia subsp. kotschyana include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Alsine tenuifolia subsp. kotschyana can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
